content.en:
Suddenly.

Zero thought of Ye Tian's origin, he was a native of the Great Universe and the Heavenly Monarch of the Human Race.

"Wanfa Daozi is a person of the human race, I heard that many natives value their hometown very much, Wanfa Daozi should also value the human race, right?"

He had no feelings for his former race, so he didn't understand them.

However, if Ye Tian attaches great importance to the Terrans, if he attacks the Terrans, he should be able to lead Ye Tian out.

Of course, he couldn't let the Void Heaven Temple know that he was dealing with the Terrans, otherwise he would be exposed.

Swish!

Zero shuttled to the territory of the Terrans, and secretly attacked many Earth Lords and Divine Generals of the Terrans, and directly bombarded these people.

However, the Terran, which is located in the core area of the Terran, has no way to start.

There is the strongest defense array and monitoring array there, and even if he wants to make a move, he can't completely hide the traces.

But as long as there are enough human races secretly killed, it will definitely alarm Ye Tian.

As more and more Terrans died, the Terran higher-ups began to panic.

In the core area of the Terrans, a group of Terran Heavenly Monarchs are discussing.

Mixed Yuan Heavenly Monarch, Kunwu Heavenly Monarch, and Ye Tian's wife Xiao Yue and sister Ye Yu were also among them, and both of them had also advanced to the ranks of Heavenly Monarchs, and their strength far surpassed that of other Heavenly Monarchs.

But the ones who really control the affairs of the human race are still the Mixed Yuan Heavenly Monarch, Kunwu Heavenly Monarch and others.

"Many people of the human race have disappeared recently, and even some earth lords and god generals have been lost, and several geniuses have disappeared inexplicably. Judging by the soul lamps that some geniuses left in the supreme hall of the human race, they have fallen. Kunwu Heavenly Monarch frowned.

"Who did it?" "Mixed Yuan Heavenly Monarch wondered, "Although our Terran Race is not strong, but we have our back against the Void Heaven Temple, and the Ten Thousand Laws Dao is also from our Terran Race, who dares to deal with our Terran?"

"The person who made the move must be the Heavenly Monarch, we are just a relatively weak Heavenly Monarch, I'm afraid we can't deal with this situation!" Ye Yu said, "If not, I'll go and inform my brother!"

"I can only ask Wanfa Daozi to take action!"

Mixed Yuan Heavenly Monarch nodded.

......

Void Heaven Temple.

Ye Tian was in retreat and received a summons from his sister and wife.

"Someone against the Terrans?"

Ye Tian frowned.

The first thing he thought of was the Demon Sound Sect.

After all, he caused the Demon Yin Sect to suffer heavy losses last time, and the Demon Yin Sect definitely wanted to kill him.

"No, the Demon Sound Sect should know my strength, they can't kill me at all. And my strength is far from being comparable to before, I don't know how many times stronger, they shouldn't dare to provoke me. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After pondering for a while, he still didn't think of who the enemy was.

"Anyway, let's go back!"

Ye Tian got up and left the Void Heaven Hall and flew towards the Terran territory.

------------

Somewhere in Terran territory.

Zero bared teeth grinning, his face full of cruelty and excitement.

"Wanfa Daozi, you have finally come out of the Void Heaven Palace!"

Swish!

His body vanished in an instant.

After Ye Tian returned to the Terrans, he met with his wife and sister, and asked about the high-level Terrans.

It's a pity that the high-level Terran doesn't know anything, only that the mysterious enemy is at least a Heavenly Monarch, and he is not weak, otherwise it would be impossible to silently destroy so many people of the Terran.

Subsequently, Ye Tian personally went to the accident site to investigate.

Starry Sky Continents, Worlds, Ye Tian kept probing for clues.

On a starry continent.

Ye Tian came here, and at this time, the human race on this starry sky continent had all dissipated, and his body was instantly shattered by a terrifying force.

The dead human race is not detached, there are soul imprints in the long river of time and space, and they can all be resurrected at some cost.

But as soon as the murderer is not found, the Terrans are always in danger.

Just as Ye Tian was about to leave, countless bloody forces descended.

Rumble!!!!

The void with a radius of billions of miles collapsed in an instant, and even this starry sky continent was completely reduced to ashes.

"Die!"

The figure of Zero emerges.

He had just used the Blood Demon Destruction Technique with all his might, destroying this area at the fastest speed, focusing on attacking Ye Tian.

No matter how fast Ye Tian reacted, he didn't have time to use the Great Realm to teleport away.

"It's supposed to be dead, right?"

Zero looked at the starry sky and muttered.

"Zero, it's you!"

A voice of nothingness came.

In the next moment, a figure appeared, and it was Ye Tian, the son of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao.

"How is it possible, how can you not die?"

Zero looked at Ye Tian who suddenly appeared in great surprise, very incredulous.

Under his Blood Shattering Technique, Ye Tian was not dead yet, and he didn't seem to be injured!

"Zero, your strength is indeed very strong, and you have stepped into the half-step True Spirit, but it's a pity that you don't know my strength! If it was millions of years ago, the blow you just gave might have been able to hit or kill me. But unfortunately, the time for you to assassinate me is too late, and my current strength is beyond your imagination!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Hmph, you're just your Heavenly Monarch, how strong can you be? The only thing that surprised me was that your life-saving ability was too strong. But relying solely on the life-preserving supernatural power, you shouldn't be able to stop the bloody disintegration technique I just had, it seems that you must have used the life-saving hole card given to you by your master!" Zero guessed.

"It's just that you are lonely and unheard, I am relying on my own strength to block your bloody disintegration technique, but I don't rely on any life-saving hole cards. Zero, I don't have any hatred with you, it's nothing more than the original fight for the Eternal Flame, I succeeded, and you missed. The battle for treasures is not a life-and-death feud. But thou hast slain the men of my race, and thou hast tried to assassinate me. Today, you will die!"

Ye Tian said angrily.

"Just because you want to kill me?"

Zero disdainfully sneered.

"Eternity does not extinguish the fire, fall!"

Ye Tiandao.

Rumble!!!!

Endless eternity is generated from the void and kills from all directions to zero.

Zero frowned slightly when he saw that Eternity did not extinguish the fire.

He recognized this chaotic supernatural power, which was eternal and could not extinguish the fire.

This is the 25th terrifying divine power on the Chaos Divine Power list, and Ye Tian has also cultivated this Chaotic Divine Power to the extreme level, plus Ye Tian's own strength is also extremely strong, resulting in the power of this Chaotic Divine Power being extremely terrifying.

Zero sensed a crisis from this chaotic supernatural power, a crisis of extreme concentration.

"Impossible, I used to be one of the strongest Heavenly Monarchs in Chaos, and I was also the number one Heavenly Monarch in the Great Universe, and now I have been promoted to the half-step True Spirit Realm, condensing the half-step Supreme True Spirit, and no matter how strong the Ten Thousand Laws Dao is, I am just a Heavenly Monarch, how can it be my opponent?

"The stars are immortal!"

"Bloody God and Demon Body!"

"Eternal Immortals!"

......

Zero inspired a powerful physique, and his power reached a terrifying level.

In order to become stronger, he once practiced a lot of chaos alchemy techniques, and his physical body was terrifying to the extreme, and many physiques were added, making him far superior to other heavenly monarchs, and his life-saving ability was also extremely powerful.

At the same time, Zero cast an ice-type Chaos Divine Ability, trying to resist the Eternal Immortal Divine Ability, but he didn't expect the Eternal Immortal Immortal Fire to be too terrifying, and instantly incinerated his Ice-based Chaotic Divine Ability.

Wow!

A wisp of eternal fire broke out of the layers of blockade and landed on Zero's body.

In an instant, the flesh and blood of the armor on Zero's body began to burn.

With zero strength and heritage, he can naturally annihilate the eternity on his body without extinguishing the fire, but this is the time to fight, so naturally there is no time to extinguish the fire for him.

"Wanfa Daozi, you are looking for death!"

Zero killed Ye Tian, preparing to fight Ye Tian in close quarters.

Ye Tian was not afraid and fought with Zero head-on.

Blood River Immortal Technique, Gold Devouring Divine Power, Time and Space Shifting Technique, Void Heaven Dao Body......

Ye Tian's methods are endless, whether it is speed, defense, and attack, they have reached a terrifying level, and Ye Tian's foundation is too strong.

Zero's foundation is very strong, but it is far inferior to Ye Tian, and the limit that he can reach when he is a Heavenly Monarch is naturally far inferior to Ye Tian.

Although Zero has broken through to the half-step True Spirit Realm, this is only a breakthrough at a small level, and the physical body, chaotic divine power, and divine soul have not actually been enhanced much, and the increase in real combat power is mainly the increase of true spirits.

However, after Zero's True Spirit increase, it was only slightly more powerful than Ye Tian.

The key is that Ye Tian's battle is too protracted, and he is not afraid of injuries at all, the whole person is almost immortal, and his defense is almost unbreakable.

Even Zero's Blood Demon Destruction Technique didn't break Ye Tian's defense, and other means naturally couldn't break Ye Tian's defense.

The two kept fighting, Ye Tian's injuries were almost none, and Zero's injuries began to worsen.

After fighting for a long time, the nearby territory was broken by the two of them, but Ye Tian's momentum became stronger and stronger, and Zero's momentum gradually weakened.

The battle between the two gradually attracted the attention of the Void Heaven Temple, and even attracted the attention of some other forces.

However, no one dared to approach.

Far away.

Swallowing Moon Heavenly Monarch, Peng Yu Heavenly Monarch and others came here and saw Ye Tian and Zero fighting.

"This ......" Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch was shocked, "The Ten Thousand Law Dao Son is so powerful that he can fight with Zero Frontal who has broken through to the half-step True Spirit Realm?"

Not only was the Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch extremely shocked, but the other Heavenly Monarchs were also extremely surprised.

"Wanfa Daozi is definitely invincible to the Heavenly Monarch, and can even be called the strongest Heavenly Monarch in this era of Chaos!" Peng Yu Heavenly Monarch praised.

"Would you like to help?"

A Heavenly Monarch asked.

"I can't help!" Swallowing Moon Heavenly Monarch said: "If the others participate in it, I'm afraid we will die, besides, our strength is too weak, and going in will only delay the Wanfa Daozi!"

When the major forces saw Ye Tian and Zero's fight, they were all shocked, and they were all shocked by Ye Tian.

Of course, they were also very surprised by Zero's combat power, this kind of combat power had far surpassed that of other half-step True Spirit powerhouses, if there was no Ye Tian, Zero would definitely be the strongest person in the current Great Universe.

After fighting for a long time, Zero gradually weakened.

He's instigated!

"Escape, I can't fight anymore, otherwise I will definitely be consumed to death by the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, damn it, how can there be so many terrifying Heavenly Monarchs, this is simply unrealistic!"

Zero said helplessly.
